record.bridgyOriginalText: And the biases are always there. You sit down after a long day, hand the AI a prompt, and expect a clean, neutral answer. But every model carries the bias from its what it trained on. Every one. It just shows up in different ways. One leans corporate in tone. Another defaults to Western framing. Another softens anything controversial to avoid friction. There is no neutral output. The bias is baked in. You have to catch it and adjust. (2/4)
